script.text: ――夏休み終了まであと二十日

translations.en:
――20 days until the end of summer
vacation

choices.text: 楽しくなかったと答える

route.text:
勘違いだって。俺は別に楽しくなかったよ
芽衣も、俺なんかと遊んでも楽しくないだろ

translations.en:
You're misunderstanding. I wasn't
having fun at all. Mei‚ you wouldn't
have fun playing with someone
like me either‚ would you?

route.text:
う……芽衣だって{user}君と
遊ぶより愛ちゃんと遊んだ方が
楽しいけど……愛ちゃん用事あるんだもん

translations.en:
Um… Even though Mei would rather
play with Ai-chan than
{user}-kun… Ai-chan is busy.

route.text: それは……確かに、楽しかったけど……

translations.en: That's… true‚ it was fun‚ though…

route.text:
良かったー！
それなら芽衣と一緒に遊ぼうよ！
昨日楽しかったならきっと今日も楽しいよ！

translations.en:
I'm so glad~! Then let's play
together! If yesterday was fun‚
I'm sure today will be fun too!
Thanks‚ I appreciate it.

route.text:
お礼なんていいよ～
芽衣が誘ったんだもん！

translations.en:
Don't mention it~! It was Mei
who invited you!

route.text:
大丈夫だ
むしろ手を繋いだ方が歩き辛くないか……？

translations.en:
It's okay. Actually‚ isn't it
harder to walk while holding
hands…?

route.text:
あはは……そっか
でも、無理はしないでね？
転んじゃったら、危ないし！

translations.en:
Ahaha… You're right. But don't
push yourself‚ okay? It's dangerous
if you fall!

script.text:
{user}君、おっはよ～！
迎えに来たよ

translations.en:
Good morning‚ {user}-kun~! I
came to pick you up!

script.text:
お、おはよう
本当に来るとは思わなかったよ

translations.en:
Oh‚ good morning. I didn't think
you'd actually come.

script.text:
約束したんだから当然だよ！
それに、{user}君は
もう芽衣のお友達だからね

translations.en:
Of course I came‚ we made a promise!
Besides‚ {user}-kun is Mei's
friend now!

script.text: 友達……？

translations.en: Friend…?

script.text:
あ、あれ……違った？
でも、昨日一緒に川で遊んだから
お友達だよー！

translations.en:
Ah‚ umm… Was I wrong? But we
played together at the river
yesterday‚ so we're friends~!

script.text:
一度遊んだだけで友達になるんだな……
というか、誘うなら他の人の方が
いいんじゃないか？

translations.en:
You become friends just by playing
together once…? More importantly‚
wouldn't it be better to invite
someone else if you want company?

script.text:
ここに来る前に愛ちゃんちに
誘いに行ったんだけど、親戚が来るから
遊べなくなっちゃったんだってー

translations.en:
I went to Ai-chan's house earlier
to invite her to play‚ but she said
she can't because relatives are
coming over~!

script.text:
それに、学校のお友達も夏休みは
みーんな旅行に行っちゃったりしてて
いないんだよね……

translations.en:
And‚ all my school friends are
on trips or something during
summer vacation…

script.text:
だから、{user}君が
芽衣と遊んでくれたらとっても
嬉しいんだけど……昨日は楽しくなかった？

translations.en:
So‚ Mei would be really happy if
{user}-kun played
with me… Wasn't yesterday fun?

script.text:
分かった……じゃあ一緒に遊ぼう！
今日はどこに行くんだ？

translations.en:
Alright… Then let's play together!
Where are we going today?

script.text:
今日はねー、釣り！
近くの山にいい釣り場があるんだ

translations.en:
Today~‚ we're going fishing! There's
a good fishing spot in the nearby
mountains.

script.text:
魚が凄く沢山獲れるんだよ
釣った魚をその場で塩焼きにすると
美味しいんだ～

translations.en:
You can catch a lot of fish there.
It's good to grill the fish with
salt right there~!

script.text:
釣れた魚をすぐに焼いて食べるのか
俺はやったことないんだが
危なくないのか……？

translations.en:
You eat the fish you catch right
away? I've never tried that. Isn't
it dangerous…?

script.text:
ちゃんと火を通せば大丈夫！
ほら、早く行こ～！

translations.en:
It's okay if you cook it properly!
Come on‚ let's go~!

script.text:
お、おい、結構険しい山道を抜けて来たけど
こんな所まで来て大丈夫なのか？

translations.en:
H-hey‚ we've come through quite a
rugged mountain path. Is it really
okay to come this far?

script.text:
いつも来てる場所だから平気だよ！
あ、でもでも、足元には気を付けてね？
そこら辺とか滑りやすくなってるから

translations.en:
It's okay‚ I come here all the time!
Ah‚ but be careful where you step‚
okay? It's slippery around there.

script.text:
（地面がぬかるんでいるせいもあるけど
怪我のせいでちょっと歩きにくい……）

translations.en:
(The ground is muddy‚ but my leg
injury is making it a little hard
to walk…)

script.text:
痛っ……ごめん！
こういう道歩きなれてなくて……
もう少しだけゆっくり進んでくれないか

translations.en:
Ouch… Sorry! I'm not used to
walking on paths like this… Could
you slow down a bit?

script.text:
あ、芽衣が速く進み過ぎたよね
ごめんね！　あの……さ……
ううん……やっぱり何でもない

translations.en:
Ah‚ Mei was walking too fast‚
wasn't I? I'm sorry! Hey…
Um… Actually‚ it's nothing.

script.text:
ん？　どうしたんだ？
途中まで言われると気になるな

translations.en:
Hm? What's wrong? You can't just
stop talking halfway through.

script.text:
そうだよね……。えっと……
{user}君、足、怪我してる？

translations.en:
You're right…. Well…
{user}-kun‚
is your leg injured?

script.text: いや……

translations.en: No…

script.text:
さっきからちょっと足引きずってて
歩き辛そうだな……って思ってたんだ
ごめんね……芽衣のせいだよね

translations.en:
I've been thinking that you've been
limping a little and it looks hard
for you to walk… I'm sorry…
It's my fault‚ isn't it?

script.text:
昨日芽衣を助けてくれた時に
怪我しちゃったんだよね
今日は川遊びやめてお家帰ろっか？

translations.en:
You got hurt when you saved me
yesterday‚ right? Should we just
go home instead of playing in the
river today?

script.text:
謝らないでくれ。そもそも
この怪我は芽衣のせいじゃないよ
部活中にちょっとやっただけだから

translations.en:
Don't apologize. This injury
wasn't your fault in the first
place. I hurted it a little during
club activities.

script.text: 本当に……？

translations.en: Really…?

script.text:
ああ、だから全然大丈夫だ
ほら、早く川に行こう

translations.en:
Yeah‚ so it's really okay. Come on‚
let's go to the river quickly!

script.text:
じゃあ……はい！　芽衣の手を握って
歩き辛い所は支えてあげる！
これで少しは歩きやすくなるよね

translations.en:
Then… okay! Hold Mei's hand‚ and
I'll support you where it's hard
to walk! That should help you
walk a little better‚ right?

script.text:
……実は、今日一緒に遊んで
くれないかもって思ってたんだ

translations.en:
…Actually‚ I thought you might
not want to play with me today.

script.text:
だから、{user}君が
一緒に遊ぼうって言ってくれた時
すっごく嬉しかったの

translations.en:
So I was really happy when
{user}-kun said you'd play
with me.

script.text:
あ、そろそろ着くよ！
ここを登れば……到着～！

translations.en:
Ah‚ we're almost there! If we
climb this… we're here~!

script.text:
うん、川も荒れてなさそう
釣りは出来そうだね
ええっと、どこに置いてたかなぁ

translations.en:
Yeah‚ the river seems calm. We
should be able to fish. Let me
see‚ where did I put them?

script.text:
あったあった！　見て見て！
芽衣と愛ちゃんで作った釣り竿だよ
二本あるから貸してあげる！

translations.en:
Found them‚ found them! Look‚
look! Mei and Ai-chan made these
fishing rods! I have two‚ so I'll
lend you one!

script.text:
釣り竿まであるのか……
本当によく来る遊び場なんだな
いつも釣りをしているのか？

translations.en:
You even have fishing rods…
This really is your regular
playground. Do you always fish
here?

script.text:
うん！　どっちが沢山釣れるか勝負して
負けた方は勝った方の言うことを
聞くルールなんだ～

translations.en:
Yep! We compete to see who can
catch more fish‚ and the winner
can make the loser do whatever
they want~!

script.text:
{user}君もやってみる？
芽衣と釣り勝負

translations.en:
{user}-kun‚ wanna try?
A fishing match with Mei!

script.text:
面白そうだな。いいよ、やろう！
日が暮れるまでに釣った魚の数で勝負とかは
どうだ？

translations.en:
Sounds fun. Alright‚ let's do it!
How about we compete to see who
catches more fish by sunset?

script.text:
いいね！　負けないよ。芽衣が勝ったら
{user}君にどんな命令を
しようかな。それじゃあ……スタート！

translations.en:
Okay! I won't lose. Hmm‚ what
kind of order should I give
{user}-kun if I win? Alright
then… Start!

script.text:
あ、早速食いついた！
よーしよしよーし
ゆっくりこっちに持ってきて……えい！

translations.en:
Ah‚ I got one already! Alright‚
alright‚ alright! Slowly bring it
over here… Heave-ho!

script.text:
やったー！　一匹目ゲットー！
ふふ、これは勝ちはもらったかな？

translations.en:
Got it! The first one! Fufu‚ I
guess this means I've already won?

script.text:
まだ始まったばかりだぞ
どーせ偶然だろ

translations.en:
It's only just begun! It's just a
fluke.

script.text:
ふっふっふ～どうかなー？
実は芽衣、釣りは得意なんだよね
このまま引き離しちゃうかも

translations.en:
Fufufu~ We'll see~? Actually‚
Mei is pretty good at fishing‚
you know. I might just leave you
in the dust~!

script.text:
それはずるくないか？
……おっ。こっちも食いついてきたけど……
はぁ、逃げられた

translations.en:
Isn't that cheating? …Oh. This
one bit too… Ah‚ it got away.

script.text:
あははっ、ちゃんとお魚の気持ちに
ならないとだよ～。こうやって
竿をお魚の逃げる方向に動かして……

translations.en:
Ahaha‚ you gotta get into the
mind of the fish~! Like this‚
move the rod in the direction
the fish is escaping…

script.text:
よしっ！　かかった！
見て見て～二匹目ゲット！
お魚の気持ちになるのがコツなんだよ！

translations.en:
Yes! Got it! Look‚ look~ The
second one! The trick is to
become the fish!

script.text:
なるほど、そうやって竿を動かせばいいのか
魚の逃げる方に……おおっ！
見てくれ芽衣！　俺も釣れたぞ！

translations.en:
I see‚ so that's how you move
the rod. Towards the direction
the fish is escaping… Oh! Look‚
Mei! I caught one too!

script.text:
上手上手！　いい感じだよ！
でも、負けないからね
勝つのは芽衣なんだから！

translations.en:
Good job‚ good job! You're
doing great! But I won't lose!
The winner will be Mei!

script.text:
はぁー、今日も楽しかった～
接戦だったけど勝負は芽衣の勝ちだね！
どんな命令にしようかな～

translations.en:
Haa~‚ it was fun today~! It was a
close match‚ but Mei is the
winner! What kind of order should
I give~?

script.text: あ、あまり無茶な命令はやめてくれよ……？

translations.en:
Ah‚ don't give me any
unreasonable orders…?

script.text:
んー、そうだな～
じゃあこんなのはどう？
また明日も芽衣と一緒に遊ぶこと！

translations.en:
Hmm‚ let me see. Then how about
this? Play with Mei again tomorrow!

script.text:
え？　無茶なのはやめてくれと言ったけど
本当にそんなことでいいのか？

translations.en:
Eh? I said don't give me any
unreasonable orders‚ but are you
sure that's all you want?

script.text:
うーん、それなら……
明日だけじゃなくて夏休みの間
いーっぱい芽衣と遊んでよ！

translations.en:
Hmm~‚ well then… Not just
tomorrow‚ but play with Mei
a lot during the whole summer
vacation!

script.text:
それはそれで……俺は別にいいけど
芽衣は、いいのか……？

translations.en:
Well‚ I don't mind… But are you
sure that's okay with you‚ Mei…?

script.text:
あははっ！　芽衣が決めた命令なのに
なんでそんなこと聞くの～？
一緒に遊びたいからこの命令にしたんだよ！

translations.en:
Ahaha! Why are you asking that
when it's an order that Mei
decided on~? I made this order
because I want to play with you!

script.text:
嬉しいな～
これで{user}君の夏休みは
芽衣のものだ～

translations.en:
I'm so happy! Now {user}-kun's
summer vacation belongs to Mei!

script.text:
{user}君と遊ぶの楽しいし
毎日お家まで迎えに行っちゃおうかな～
あれれ、顔が赤いけど、どうしたの？

translations.en:
It's fun playing with {user}-kun‚
maybe I'll come pick you up
every day~. Huh? Your face is red‚
what's wrong?

script.text:
大丈夫、何でもないから！
そ、それより、そろそろ帰った方が
いいんじゃないか？

translations.en:
I'm fine‚ it's nothing! M-more
importantly‚ shouldn't we be
heading back soon?

script.text:
わー、ほんとだ！　もうこんな時間！
急がないと門限過ぎちゃうかも
じゃあ、芽衣はもう帰るね！

translations.en:
Whoa‚ you're right! It's already
this late! If I don't hurry‚ I
might miss curfew. Well then‚
Mei's going home now!

script.text:
明日も家まで呼びに行くから！
寝坊しちゃだめだよ？
じゃ、またね～！

translations.en:
I'll come get you again tomorrow!
Don't oversleep‚ okay? See you
later~!

script.text: ま、また明日……

translations.en: Y-yeah… See you tomorrow…

script.text:
（……俺と遊ぶのが楽しい、か
なんか、胸が変な感じだ……
もしかして俺、芽衣のことが……）

translations.en:
(…She said she had fun playing
with me. Somehow‚ my heart feels
weird… Could it be that I‚ Mei…)
